# Noviqo Studio
> Premium website design & development studio for local businesses across India — cafes, restaurants, gyms, dental clinics, salons, and schools. Live in 7 days, from Rs 9,999.

## About
Noviqo Studio builds fast, mobile-first, WhatsApp-integrated websites with local SEO built in. Tagline: Design. Develop. Grow. / Look bigger. Get booked.

## Services
- Premium website design & development (1-page to 10+ page custom sites)
- Local SEO & Google Business setup
- WhatsApp enquiry/booking integration
- Website care plans (hosting, security, edits, SEO) from Rs 999/month
- Branding & business automation

## Pricing
- Launch: Rs 9,999 (1-page premium site)
- Business: Rs 24,999 (5-6 page custom site) — most popular
- Premium: Rs 49,999 (10+ pages, automation)

- Website: https://noviqo.co.in

- Based in Bengaluru, serving all of India
